title: Cruel Summer
why_this_song: Cruel Summer by Taylor Swift (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 20 times; first heard in: "And it's new, the shape of your body"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "It's a cruel summer"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's a cruel summer"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Devils roll the dice, angels roll their eyes"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I don't wanna keep secrets just to keep you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "summer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "summer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Said, "I'm fine," but it wasn't true

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know that I caught it
It's blue, the feeling I've got
He looks up grinning like a devil

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Cruel Summer", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Cruel Summer", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Cruel Summer" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Cruel Summer" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Cruel Summer" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Cruel Summer", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
